prompt:
Update reel-life flake input URL after repo transfer.

In flake.nix line 45, change:
  url = "github:patflynn/reel-life";
to:
  url = "github:gunk-dev/reel-life";

Then run 'nix flake update reel-life' to update flake.lock with the new URL.
Run 'nix flake check' to verify everything still works.

This is a one-line change plus lock file update. Keep the PR minimal.
